summary: AI Character Memory System testing complete. 23/23 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Character Library shows 4 characters with visual_summary/style_lock/memory_entries. Character Creator 4-step wizard works. Safety layer blocks copyrighted names (Spider-Man → Tier 1 error toast). Character Detail shows Visual Bible with locked rules, Safety Profile, Memory Timeline. SeriesTimeline shows attached characters zone with 3 character chips and Attach Character button.
critical_code_review_comments: characters.py lines 64-91: BLOCKED_IP_NAMES contains 100+ copyrighted character names (Disney, Marvel, DC, Anime, etc.)
characters.py lines 94-102: SIMILARITY_PATTERNS regex list catches phrases like 'like Spider-Man', 'similar to Batman'
characters.py lines 111-147: screen_safety() implements 3-tier protection returning {safe, reason, tier}
characters.py lines 213-228: create endpoint runs safety check before LLM visual bible generation
characters.py lines 313-372: _generate_visual_bible() calls LLM to create canonical_description and do_not_change_rules
characters.py lines 566-662: build_character_prompt_package() returns 5 blocks (identity, visual_lock, memory, scene, negative_constraints)
CharacterCreator.js: 4-step wizard with Identity→Personality→Appearance→Review flow, data-testid attributes present
CharacterLibrary.js: Grid of character cards with name, species, role, visual_summary, memory_entries count
CharacterDetail.js: 3-column layout showing portrait zone, visual bible with locked rules, memory timeline
SeriesTimeline.js lines 492-564: Attached characters zone with character chips, Attach Character button, character picker
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test characters: TEST_OriginalHero and TEST_VisualBibleTest for visual bible generation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Character Memory system fully operational. Safety layer blocks copyrighted names at Tier 1, similarity patterns at Tier 1/2, celebrity resemblance at Tier 3. Visual bible LLM generation works and returns canonical_description + do_not_change_rules. Portrait generation (gpt-image-1) available but not tested to avoid R2 costs. Characters attach to series via POST /api/characters/attach-to-series/{series_id}. Existing test characters: Finn, Zara, TEST_OriginalHero, TEST_VisualBibleTest.

POST_characters_create_returns_200.evidence: Clean original character created with visual_bible containing canonical_description and do_not_change_rules

safety_tier1_blocks_copyrighted_names.evidence: Spider-Man, Elsa, Naruto, Batman all return 422 with tier=1

safety_tier2_blocks_similarity_patterns.evidence: 'like Batman', 'similar to Spider-Man' blocked (caught by Tier 1 since names are in text)

safety_tier3_blocks_celebrity_resemblanc.evidence: 'looks like Taylor Swift' returns 422 with tier=3

GET_my_characters_returns_list.evidence: Returns array with visual_summary, style_lock, memory_entries fields

PATCH_character_updates_fields.evidence: Updates core_goals field successfully, re-checks safety on name change

GET_character_memory_returns_timeline.evidence: Returns memories array with total count

auth_required_on_all_endpoints.evidence: All endpoints return 401/403 without auth token

character_library_page_loads.evidence: Shows 4 character cards with name, species, role, visual summary, memory count

safety_block_shows_error_toast.evidence: Spider-Man creation shows red toast: 'Cannot create characters based on copyrighted IP'

character_detail_3_column_layout.evidence: Portrait zone + Visual Bible + Memory Timeline visible

visual_bible_shows_locked_rules.evidence: Locked Rules section shows 'same eye color: amber', 'same scarf: red bandana' etc.

series_timeline_attached_characters_zone.evidence: 3 attached character chips visible with Lock icon and Attach Character button

dashboard_more_tools_character_memory.evidence: Character Memory card visible in More Tools grid with 'Persistent AI characters' description
